comments:
Core effect types and parameter infrastructure.

Defines effect parameter types, parameter values, effect categories,
and effect instances.

declarations.comments: Type of parameter an effect can have.
declarations.title: EffectParameterType

declarations.comments: All effect parameter types for enumeration
declarations.title: allEffectParameterTypes

declarations.comments: Type of animatable value for effects.
declarations.title: EffectAnimatableType

declarations.comments: All effect animatable types for enumeration
declarations.title: allEffectAnimatableTypes

declarations.comments:
RGBA color for effect parameters.

RGB channels are 0-255, alpha is 0.0-1.0.
declarations.title: EffectRGBA

declarations.comments: Point on a curve (for bezier/spline parameters).
declarations.title: CurvePoint

declarations.comments: Instance of an effect parameter with current value.
declarations.title: EffectParameter

declarations.comments: Instance of an effect on a layer.
declarations.title: EffectInstance

declarations.comments: Effect instance with mesh deformation capabilities.
declarations.title: MeshDeformEffectInstance

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Motion.Effects.Core
